title: ALL THE FISH
description: Unique Textures for all 2700 possible Tropical Fish.
body: ![#ALL THE FISH](https://i.imgur.com/D86wqHO.png)\ [![requires chime](https://i.imgur.com/uReomNO.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime/)\ Makes tropical fish buckets display the colors, shape, and pattern of the fish ## 2700?! How? There are 12 different body types given to tropical fish\ ![fish bodies](https://i.imgur.com/xE8SrPo.png)\ Each fish has a unique body and pattern color, with 15 colors available.\ (there are actually 16, but the color black does not appear on any naturally-spawned tropical fish, since the eyes are usually hard to see)\ ![fish colors](https://i.imgur.com/B9zncsJ.png)\ 12 \* 15 \* 15 = 2700 ## Prefer a smoother look? Consider the 64x XBR version Like this XBR look for textures? Take a look at [VanillaXBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanillaxbr) ## Hyper fast fish gif I am having too much fun making preview gifs for this pack
